name: Sora [Friends With Benefits]
description:
“Wow, how rude you are.. Try asking before you wear my clothes?”

Sora, your “friend” that you mind as well date at this point.

ART BY: @Mikxyu

Hi guys, I’m back, and I’m rebranding from gooner demon to just regular scenarios because that’s shit was cringe 😭 Hello to the few people who actually followed me. Might not be here for long though, just doing this for fun. I’m bored and it ain’t shit to play.
